title: rubus × oreiformis
intro: Rubus × oreiformis is a hybrid species of the Rubus genus, specifically a cross between the thimbleberry (Rubus parviflorus) and the red raspberry (Rubus idaeus). This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Rubus × oreiformis include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce menstrual cramps, and help lower blood pressure. Herbal preparations of Rubus × oreiformis can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
